data.title: Elon Musk Updates Profile Picture to Reflect xAI Concept
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Elon Musk has updated his profile picture to feature the 'xAI' concept image, aligning with the style of his background image, which includes 'xAI / Grok - TO UNDERSTAND.' Previously, his profile picture was a 'Kekius Maximus' concept meme image.

data.title: Elon Musk Reverts Twitter Handle to Original Name
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Elon Musk has changed his Twitter handle back to "Elon Musk" after previously using the name "Kekius Maximus."

data.title: U.S. House Republicans Pass Legislation Impacting Income Distribution
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a significant legislative package passed by House Republicans highlights contrasting impacts on high-income earners and low-income families. Experts note that the "Beautiful Act" primarily benefits the wealthiest Americans through tax cuts aimed at business owners, investors, and homeowners in high-tax areas, while low-income individuals face adverse effects.

The disparity arises as Republicans offset these tax reductions by cutting social security programs. The nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office (CBO) estimates that due to adjustments in the bill, the income of the lowest 10% of households will decrease by 2% in 2027 and by 4% in 2033. In contrast, the income of the highest 10% of households is projected to increase by 4% in 2027 and by 2% in 2033.

data.title: Why is Crypto Down: Trump Tariff Threats Halt Bulls
data.description:
Investors aren’t easing off the gas. Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs just brought in over $1 billion in combined net inflows on a single day, their biggest haul in months. With crypto markets heating back up and institutional interest holding steady, Thursday’s surge is a strong signal that traditional investors aren’t sitting this rally out. Bitcoin
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/presales/why-is-crypto-down-trump-tariff-threats-halt-bulls/

data.title: Best Crypto to Buy as Bitcoin’s Largest-Ever Options Expiry Set to Push the King Crypto over $110K
data.description:
Bitcoin is headed towards its largest option expiry of 2025 at around $13. 8B on May 30. Just a week earlier, the OG crypto crossed its previous high of $109K and made a new all-time high. However, over the past week, the prices have corrected by around 3%, meaning $BTC is now trading at around $108K
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/best-crypto-to-buy-as-bitcoins-largest-ever-options-expiry-set-to-push-the-king-crypto-over-110k/
